title: Demos Four
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{CelestialBody |image= |name=Demos Four |region=*[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} *[[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]The [[:File:MiscellaneousRegions.jpg|Client States and Miscellaneous Regions map]] in ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the entirety of grid square N-16 in the [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]]. |sector=[[Dustig sector/Legends|Dustig sector]] |system=[[Demos system/Legends|Demos system]] |coordinates=N-16 |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position= |moons=2 |routes=[[Dustig Trace]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class= |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain= |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species= |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language= |government= |population= |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} {{Quote|A Nautolan. Pretty far from an ocean, aren't you?''"
"''I'm waiting.''"
"''No sense of humor. All right: Alderaan has three moons.''"
"''Demos Four but two.|[[Sheeka Tull]] and [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]]|''[[The Cestus Deception]]''}} '''Demos Four''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with two [[Moon/Legends|moons]], located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. It was located on the [[Dustig Trace]], nearby to the [[Tyus Cluster/Legends|Tyus Cluster]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1stm}} *[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]] {{Mo}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} [[Category:Dustig sector locations]] [[Category:Locations along the Dustig Trace]] [[Category:Planets in the Mid Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the Trailing Sectors]]
